tEn: Text and Code Embeddings by Contrastive Pre-Training
tZh: 通过对比预训练学习文本和代码嵌入
sEn: Contrastive pre-training on unsupervised data at scale produces high-quality vector representations for text and code, achieving state-of-the-art results in classification and search tasks.
sZh: 大规模无监督数据上的对比预训练能够生成高质量的文本和代码向量表示，在分类和搜索任务中达到最优结果。
absEn: Text embeddings are useful features in many applications such as semantic search and computing text similarity. Previous work typically trains models customized for different use cases, varying in dataset choice, training objective and model architecture. In this work, we show that contrastive pre-training on unsupervised data at scale leads to high quality vector representations of text and code. The same unsupervised text embeddings that achieve new state-of-the-art results in linear-probe classification also display impressive semantic search capabilities and sometimes even perform competitively with fine-tuned models. On linear-probe classification accuracy averaging over 7 tasks, our best unsupervised model achieves a relative improvement of 4% and 1.8% over previous best unsupervised and supervised text embedding models respectively. The same text embeddings when evaluated on large-scale semantic search attains a relative improvement of 23.4%, 14.7%, and 10.6% over previous best unsupervised methods on MSMARCO, Natural Questions and TriviaQA benchmarks, respectively. Similarly to text embeddings, we train code embedding models on (text, code) pairs, obtaining a 20.8% relative improvement over prior best work on code search.
absZh: 文本嵌入在语义搜索和文本相似度计算等许多应用中都是有用的特征。以往的工作通常针对不同用例定制训练模型，在数据集选择、训练目标和模型架构上各不相同。在这项工作中，我们表明，在大规模无监督数据上进行对比预训练可以产生高质量的文本和代码向量表示。相同的无监督文本嵌入在线性探测分类中取得了新的最优结果，同时展现出令人印象深刻的语义搜索能力，有时甚至与微调模型竞争。在线性探测分类准确率上，平均7个任务，我们的最佳无监督模型相对于之前最佳的无监督和有监督文本嵌入模型分别实现了4%和1.8%的相对提升。相同的文本嵌入在大规模语义搜索评估中，在MSMARCO、Natural Questions和TriviaQA基准测试上，相对于之前最佳的无监督方法分别实现了23.4%、14.7%和10.6%的相对提升。与文本嵌入类似，我们在（文本，代码）对上训练代码嵌入模型，在代码搜索上相对于之前的最佳工作获得了20.8%的相对提升。

contrib.en: Shows contrastive pre-training on unsupervised data at scale yields high-quality text and code embeddings.
contrib.zh: 表明在无监督数据上进行大规模对比预训练可产生高质量的文本和代码嵌入。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art linear-probe classification with 4% relative improvement over prior unsupervised methods.
contrib.zh: 在线性探测分类上取得最优结果，相对先前无监督方法提升4%。

contrib.en: Attains 23.4%, 14.7%, and 10.6% relative improvement on MSMARCO, Natural Questions, and TriviaQA semantic search.
contrib.zh: 在MSMARCO、Natural Questions和TriviaQA语义搜索上分别相对提升23.4%、14.7%和10.6%。

contrib.en: Code embeddings achieve 20.8% relative improvement on CodeSearchNet code search benchmark.
contrib.zh: 代码嵌入在CodeSearchNet代码搜索基准上相对提升20.8%。

contrib.en: Demonstrates zero-shot and k-NN classification competitive with supervised methods on SST-2.
contrib.zh: 在SST-2上展示零样本和k-NN分类与监督方法竞争的性能。

contrib.en: Fine-tuned models outperform previous transfer methods by 2.2% on NLI tasks.
contrib.zh: 微调模型在NLI任务上超越先前迁移方法2.2%。

limits.en: Underperforms on sentence similarity tasks compared to prior state-of-the-art.
limits.zh: 在句子相似性任务上表现不如先前最优方法。

limits.en: Requires large batch sizes and substantial computational resources for training.
limits.zh: 需要大批量大小和大量计算资源进行训练。

limits.en: Code embeddings show no performance gain with increased model size from 300M to 1.2B parameters.
limits.zh: 代码嵌入在参数从3亿增至12亿时未见性能提升。

limits.en: Potential biases in training data may cause representational harms in downstream applications.
limits.zh: 训练数据中的潜在偏见可能在下游应用中造成表征伤害。

limits.en: Sentence similarity and search tasks may have conflicting objectives, limiting joint optimization.
limits.zh: 句子相似性和搜索任务可能目标冲突，限制联合优化。

items.en: Text embeddings are useful features in many applications such as semantic search and computing text similarity. Previous work typically trains models customized for different use cases, varying in dataset choice, training objective and model architecture. In this work, we show that contrastive pre-training on unsupervised data at scale leads to high quality vector representations of text and code. The same unsupervised text embeddings that achieve new state-of-the-art results in linear-probe classification also display impressive semantic search capabilities and sometimes even perform competitively with fine-tuned models. On linear-probe classification accuracy averaging over 7 tasks, our best unsupervised model achieves a relative improvement of 4% and 1.8% over previous best unsupervised and supervised text embedding models respectively. The same text embeddings when evaluated on large-scale semantic search attains a relative improvement of 23.4%, 14.7%, and 10.6% over previous best unsupervised methods on MSMARCO, Natural Questions and TriviaQA benchmarks, respectively. Similarly to text embeddings, we train code embedding models on (text, code) pairs, obtaining a 20.8% relative improvement over prior best work on code search.
items.zh: 文本嵌入在许多应用（如语义搜索和文本相似度计算）中是有用的特征。先前的工作通常针对不同用例训练定制模型，在数据集选择、训练目标和模型架构上有所变化。在这项工作中，我们表明，在无监督数据上进行大规模对比预训练能够产生高质量的文本和代码向量表示。在线性探测分类中取得最新最优结果的相同无监督文本嵌入，也展现出令人印象深刻的语义搜索能力，有时甚至与微调模型竞争。在7个任务的平均线性探测分类准确率上，我们最好的无监督模型相较于先前最好的无监督和有监督文本嵌入模型分别取得了4%和1.8%的相对提升。当在大规模语义搜索上评估时，相同的文本嵌入在MSMARCO、Natural Questions和TriviaQA基准上相较于先前最好的无监督方法分别取得了23.4%、14.7%和10.6%的相对提升。与文本嵌入类似，我们在（文本，代码）对上训练代码嵌入模型，在代码搜索上相较于先前最佳工作取得了20.8%的相对提升。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Average performance of unsupervised cpt-text models of different sizes across 22 tasks consisting of linear-probe classification, text search, and sentence similarity tasks.
items.capZh: 图1：不同大小的无监督cpt-text模型在22个任务（包括线性探测分类、文本搜索和句子相似度任务）上的平均性能。

items.en: Deep unsupervised learning with generative and embedding models has seen dramatic success in the past few years. Generative models (Peters et al., 2018; Raffel et al., 2019; van den Oord et al., 2016; Ramesh et al., 2021; Brown et al., 2020; Chen et al., 2021) are trained to maximize the likelihood of observed data while embedding models are trained to distinguish observed data from noise (Sohn, 2016; van den Oord et al., 2018; Radford et al., 2021; Jia et al., 2021; Gao et al., 2021; Izacard et al., 2021). Generative models have been shown to produce realistic content and benefit many downstream applications, reducing the need for labeled training datasets. In generative models, the information about the input is typically distributed over multiple hidden states of the model. While some generative models (Kingma & Welling, 2014; Kiros et al., 2015) can learn a single representation of the input, most autoregressive Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017) models do not (Raffel et al., 2019; Brown et al., 2020; Chen et al., 2021; Ramesh et al., 2021). However, learning such a representation (or embedding) is necessary for many tasks. Systems that search over millions or billions of items require each entry to be embedded as a dense representation and build an index in advance to save computational costs at query time. These embeddings are useful features for classification tasks and can also enable data visualization applications via techniques such as clustering. Embedding models are explicitly optimized to learn a low dimensional representation that captures the semantic meaning of the input (Radford et al., 2021; Jia et al., 2021; Giorgi et al., 2020; Gao et al., 2021; Izacard et al., 2021).
items.zh: 过去几年，深度无监督学习在生成模型和嵌入模型方面取得了巨大成功。生成模型（Peters等人，2018；Raffel等人，2019；van den Oord等人，2016；Ramesh等人，2021；Brown等人，2020；Chen等人，2021）被训练以最大化观测数据的似然，而嵌入模型则被训练以区分观测数据和噪声（Sohn，2016；van den Oord等人，2018；Radford等人，2021；Jia等人，2021；Gao等人，2021；Izacard等人，2021）。生成模型已被证明能够生成逼真的内容并有益于许多下游应用，减少了对标注训练数据集的需求。在生成模型中，关于输入的信息通常分布在模型的多个隐藏状态中。虽然一些生成模型（Kingma & Welling，2014；Kiros等人，2015）可以学习输入的单一表示，但大多数自回归Transformer（Vaswani等人，2017）模型不能（Raffel等人，2019；Brown等人，2020；Chen等人，2021；Ramesh等人，2021）。然而，学习这样的表示（或嵌入）对于许多任务是必要的。搜索数百万或数十亿条目的系统需要将每个条目嵌入为密集表示，并预先建立索引以节省查询时的计算成本。这些嵌入是分类任务的有用特征，还可以通过聚类等技术实现数据可视化应用。嵌入模型被明确优化以学习捕获输入语义含义的低维表示（Radford等人，2021；Jia等人，2021；Giorgi等人，2020；Gao等人，2021；Izacard等人，2021）。

items.en: In this work, we train embedding models using a contrastive learning objective with in-batch negatives (Sohn, 2016; Yih et al., 2011) on unlabeled data. The input is encoded with a Transformer encoder (Vaswani et al., 2017) and we leverage naturally occurring paired data to construct training data with no explicit labels. Text embedding models are trained on paired text data where we consider neighboring pieces of text on the Internet as positive pairs. Code embedding models treat the top-level docstring in a function along with its implementation as a (text, code) pair. The training signal of the contrastive objective on its own is not sufficient to learn useful representations and we overcome this by initializing our model with other pre-trained models (Brown et al., 2020; Chen et al., 2021). Finally, we find that it is critical to use a sufficiently large batch to achieve the optimal performance. We show that this simple recipe combining pre-trained model initialization, large-batch contrastive learning and training at scale, can produce text and code embeddings that possess a broad range of capabilities.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们使用对比学习目标（Sohn，2016；Yih等人，2011）在无标签数据上训练嵌入模型，并采用批内负样本。输入通过Transformer编码器（Vaswani等人，2017）编码，我们利用自然发生的配对数据来构建训练数据，无需显式标签。文本嵌入模型在配对文本数据上训练，其中我们将互联网上相邻的文本片段视为正样本对。代码嵌入模型将函数中的顶级文档字符串及其实现视为（文本，代码）对。仅靠对比目标的训练信号不足以学习有用的表示，我们通过使用其他预训练模型（Brown等人，2020；Chen等人，2021）初始化模型来克服这一点。最后，我们发现使用足够大的批次以达到最佳性能至关重要。我们表明，这种结合预训练模型初始化、大批次对比学习和大规模训练的简单方法，可以产生具有广泛能力的文本和代码嵌入。

items.en: We train a series of unsupervised text embedding models (cpt-text) of different sizes, ranging from 300M to 175B parameters, and observe a consistent performance improvement with increasing model sizes (Figure 1). On classification accuracy averaging across 7 linear-probe classification tasks in SentEval (Conneau & Kiela, 2018), our largest unsupervised model achieves new state-of-the-art results with a relative improvement of 4% and 1.8% over the previous best unsupervised (Giorgi et al., 2020) and supervised (Gao et al., 2021) text embedding models, respectively.
items.zh: 我们训练了一系列不同大小的无监督文本嵌入模型（cpt-text），参数范围从3亿到1750亿，并观察到随着模型大小的增加，性能持续提升（图1）。在SentEval（Conneau & Kiela，2018）中7个线性探测分类任务的平均分类准确率上，我们最大的无监督模型取得了新的最优结果，相较于先前最好的无监督（Giorgi等人，2020）和有监督（Gao等人，2021）文本嵌入模型分别取得了4%和1.8%的相对提升。

items.en: Text embedding in previous work was studied under different domains, varying in data, training objective and model architecture. Precisely, sentence embedding (Reimers & Gurevych, 2019; Gao et al., 2021; Giorgi et al., 2020) and neural information retrieval (Lee et al., ; Guu et al., 2020; Karpukhin et al., 2020a; Sachan et al., 2021; Izacard et al., 2021) have remained different research topics evaluated on distinct benchmarks, even though both aim to learn high-quality text representation. However, we find the same model that achieves good performance on sentence embedding benchmarks, as discussed above, is also able to obtain impressive results on large-scale information retrieval. When evaluated on the MSMARCO passage ranking task (Nguyen et al., 2016) to search over 4M passages, cpt-text gets a relative improvement of 23.4% over previous best unsupervised methods (Robertson, 2009). On the task of searching on 21M documents from Wikipedia, cpt-text obtains a relative improvement of 14.7%, and 10.6% over previous unsupervised methods (Izacard et al., 2021) for Natural Questions (Kwiatkowski et al., 2019) and TriviaQA (Joshi et al., 2017), respectively. On TriviaQA, our unsupervised method is even competitive with fine-tuned models.
items.zh: 先前工作中的文本嵌入在不同领域下进行研究，在数据、训练目标和模型架构上有所变化。具体来说，句子嵌入（Reimers & Gurevych，2019；Gao等人，2021；Giorgi等人，2020）和神经信息检索（Lee等人；Guu等人，2020；Karpukhin等人，2020a；Sachan等人，2021；Izacard等人，2021）一直是不同的研究主题，在独立的基准上评估，尽管两者都旨在学习高质量的文本表示。然而，我们发现，在句子嵌入基准上表现良好的同一模型，如上所述，也能在大规模信息检索上取得令人印象深刻的结果。当在MSMARCO段落排序任务（Nguyen等人，2016）上评估，搜索超过400万段落时，cpt-text相较于先前最好的无监督方法（Robertson，2009）取得了23.4%的相对提升。在从维基百科搜索2100万文档的任务中，cpt-text在Natural Questions（Kwiatkowski等人，2019）和TriviaQA（Joshi等人，2017）上相较于先前无监督方法（Izacard等人，2021）分别取得了14.7%和10.6%的相对提升。在TriviaQA上，我们的无监督方法甚至与微调模型竞争。

items.en: Next, we train code embedding models (cpt-code) using the same recipe. Our models learn via (text, code) pairs, extracted from open source code. We evaluate our model on CodeSearchNet (Husain et al., 2020), a commonly used code search benchmark, where the task is to find the most relevant code snippet given a natural language query. Our models achieve new state-of-the-art results with a 20.8% relative improvement over the previous best result (Guo et al., 2021). Unlike text embedding models, we observe no performance improvement on code search when increasing the number of parameters of cpt-code from 300M to 1.2B.
items.zh: 接下来，我们使用相同的方法训练代码嵌入模型（cpt-code）。我们的模型通过从开源代码中提取的（文本，代码）对进行学习。我们在CodeSearchNet（Husain等人，2020）上评估模型，这是一个常用的代码搜索基准，任务是根据自然语言查询找到最相关的代码片段。我们的模型取得了新的最优结果，相较于先前最佳结果（Guo等人，2021）取得了20.8%的相对提升。与文本嵌入模型不同，我们观察到当cpt-code的参数从3亿增加到12亿时，代码搜索性能没有提升。

items.en: Finally, we experiment with fine-tuning our models on several supervised datasets and study the transfer learning performance. When fine-tuned on NLI (Natural Language Inference) datasets, we see a further boost in linear-probe classification, outperforming the previous best transfer method (Gao et al., 2021) by 2.2%. On SST-2 sentiment classification (Socher et al., 2013), we find that our representations are sufficiently descriptive that even a simple k𝑘k-NN classifier achieves results comparable to a linear-probe classifier. Interestingly, zero-shot performance with our embeddings outperforms the supervised neural network models introduced along with the release of the SST-2 dataset. We also fine-tune the unsupervised model on MSMARCO and evaluate it on a suite of zero-shot search tasks in the BEIR benchmark (Thakur et al., 2021). In the transfer setting, our models achieve a 5.2% relative improvement over previous methods (Izacard et al., 2021) and is comparable even with methods (Santhanam et al., 2021; Formal et al., 2021; Wang et al., 2020) that demand substantially more computation at test time.
items.zh: 最后，我们在几个有监督数据集上微调模型，并研究迁移学习性能。当在NLI（自然语言推理）数据集上微调时，我们看到线性探测分类进一步改进，优于先前最好的迁移方法（Gao等人，2021）2.2%。在SST-2情感分类（Socher等人，2013）上，我们发现我们的表示足够描述性，以至于简单的k-NN分类器也能达到与线性探测分类器相当的结果。有趣的是，使用我们的嵌入进行零样本性能优于随SST-2数据集发布的有监督神经网络模型。我们还在MSMARCO上微调无监督模型，并在BEIR基准（Thakur等人，2021）的一组零样本搜索任务上评估。在迁移设置中，我们的模型相较于先前方法（Izacard等人，2021）取得了5.2%的相对提升，并且与在测试时要求显著更多计算的方法（Santhanam等人，2021；Formal等人，2021；Wang等人，2020）相当。

items.en: Our models are trained with a contrastive objective on paired data. In this section, we present more details on the model architecture and the training objective. The training set consists of paired samples, {(xi,yi)}i=1Nsubscriptsuperscriptsubscript𝑥𝑖subscript𝑦𝑖𝑁𝑖1\{(x_{i},y_{i})\}^{N}_{i=1}, where (xi,yi)subscript𝑥𝑖subscript𝑦𝑖(x_{i},y_{i}) corresponds to a positive example pair, indicating that xisubscript𝑥𝑖x_{i} and yisubscript𝑦𝑖y_{i} are semantically similar or contextually relevant.
items.zh: 我们的模型使用对比目标在配对数据上训练。在本节中，我们提供关于模型架构和训练目标的更多细节。训练集由配对样本组成，{(xi,yi)}i=1N，其中(xi,yi)对应一个正样本对，表示xi和yi在语义上相似或上下文相关。

items.capEn: Figure 2: The encoder E𝐸E maps input x𝑥x to embedding vxsubscript𝑣𝑥v_{x}. Special tokens, [SOS] and [EOS], are appended to the start and end of the input sequence respectively. The last layer hidden state corresponding to the token [EOS] is extracted as the embedding of the input sequence.
items.capZh: 图2：编码器E将输入x映射到嵌入vx。特殊标记[SOS]和[EOS]分别附加到输入序列的开头和结尾。提取对应于标记[EOS]的最后一层隐藏状态作为输入序列的嵌入。

items.en: Given a training pair (x,y)𝑥𝑦(x,y), a Transformer (Vaswani et al., 2017) encoder E𝐸E is used to process x𝑥x and y𝑦y independently. The encoder maps the input to a dense vector representation or embedding (Figure 2). We insert two special token delimiters, [SOS] and [EOS], to the start and end of the input sequence respectively. The hidden state from the last layer corresponding to the special token [EOS] is considered as the embedding of the input sequence.
items.zh: 给定一个训练对(x,y)，使用Transformer（Vaswani等人，2017）编码器E独立处理x和y。编码器将输入映射到密集向量表示或嵌入（图2）。我们在输入序列的开头和结尾分别插入两个特殊标记分隔符[SOS]和[EOS]。对应于特殊标记[EOS]的最后一层隐藏状态被视为输入序列的嵌入。

items.capEn: Figure 3: The encoder E𝐸E maps inputs x𝑥x and y𝑦y, to embeddings, vxsubscript𝑣𝑥v_{x} and vysubscript𝑣𝑦v_{y} independently. The similarity score between x𝑥x and y𝑦y is defined as the cosine similarity between these two embedding vectors.
items.capZh: 图3：编码器E将输入x和y独立映射到嵌入vx和vy。x和y之间的相似度分数定义为这两个嵌入向量之间的余弦相似度。

items.en: The Transformer encoder maps the input, x𝑥x and y𝑦y, to embeddings, vxsubscript𝑣𝑥v_{x} and vysubscript𝑣𝑦v_{y} respectively and the similarity between two inputs is quantified by the cosine similarity between their embeddings, vxsubscript𝑣𝑥v_{x} and vysubscript𝑣𝑦v_{y} (Figure 3).
items.zh: Transformer编码器将输入x和y映射到嵌入vx和vy，两个输入之间的相似度通过其嵌入vx和vy之间的余弦相似度来量化（图3）。

items.en: where ⊕direct-sum\oplus is an operation to concatenate two strings together. We found that using different delimiters leads to more stable training. For x𝑥x, we use ‘[’ as [SOS]xsubscript[SOS]𝑥\texttt{[SOS]}_{x} and ‘]’ as [EOS]xsubscript[EOS]𝑥\texttt{[EOS]}_{x}, while we use ‘{’ and ‘}’ as [SOS]ysubscript[SOS]𝑦\texttt{[SOS]}_{y} and [EOS]ysubscript[EOS]𝑦\texttt{[EOS]}_{y} respectively for y𝑦y.
items.zh: 其中⊕是连接两个字符串的操作。我们发现使用不同的分隔符会导致更稳定的训练。对于x，我们使用'['作为[SOS]x，']'作为[EOS]x，而对于y，我们分别使用'{'和'}'作为[SOS]y和[EOS]y。

items.en: The paired samples in the training set are contrasted against in-batch negatives (Yih et al., 2011; Sohn, 2016). Contrastive learning with in-batch negatives has been widely used for unsupervised representation learning in prior work (Radford et al., 2021; Jia et al., 2021; Chen et al., 2020; Izacard et al., 2021). For each example in a mini-batch of M𝑀M examples, the other (M−1)𝑀1(M-1) in the batch are used as negative examples. The usage of in-batch negatives enables re-use of computation both in the forward and the backward pass making training highly efficient. The logits for one batch is a M×M𝑀𝑀M\times M matrix, where each entry logit​(xi,yj)logitsubscript𝑥𝑖subscript𝑦𝑗\text{logit}(x_{i},y_{j}) is given by,
items.zh: 训练集中的配对样本与批内负样本（Yih等人，2011；Sohn，2016）进行对比。使用批内负样本的对比学习已在先前工作中广泛用于无监督表示学习（Radford等人，2021；Jia等人，2021；Chen等人，2020；Izacard等人，2021）。对于小批量中M个示例中的每个示例，批次中的其他(M-1)个用作负样本。使用批内负样本可以在前向和后向传播中重用计算，使训练非常高效。一个批次的logits是一个M×M矩阵，其中每个条目logit(xi,yj)由下式给出：

items.en: where τ𝜏\tau is a trainable temperature parameter.
items.zh: 其中τ是可训练的温度参数。

items.en: Only entries on the diagonal of the matrix are considered positive examples. The final training loss is the sum of the cross entropy losses on the row and the column direction, as described in the following numpy style pseudo code.
items.zh: 只有矩阵对角线上的条目被视为正样本。最终训练损失是行方向和列方向上的交叉熵损失之和，如下面的numpy风格伪代码所述。

items.en: We initialize our models with pre-trained generative language models. cpt-text is initialized with GPT models (Brown et al., 2020) and cpt-code is initialized with Codex models (Chen et al., 2021). When fine-tuning our models (Section 3), the supervised training data like NLI datasets contain explicit negative examples and they are used along with the in-batch negatives.
items.zh: 我们使用预训练的生成语言模型初始化模型。cpt-text使用GPT模型（Brown等人，2020）初始化，cpt-code使用Codex模型（Chen等人，2021）初始化。当微调我们的模型（第3节）时，有监督训练数据（如NLI数据集）包含显式负样本，它们与批内负样本一起使用。

items.en: Our models are trained on naturally occurring paired data. cpt-text models are trained on Internet data with neighboring pieces of text as positive pairs for the contrastive objective. The code embedding cpt-code models use (text, code) pairs extracted from open source code. As discussed in Section 3.4.1, sufficiently large batch size is crucial to achieve good performance with our setup. Table 1 lists the batch sizes used to train the models of different sizes.
items.zh: 我们的模型在自然发生的配对数据上训练。cpt-text模型在互联网数据上训练，将相邻的文本片段作为对比目标的正样本对。代码嵌入cpt-code模型使用从开源代码中提取的（文本，代码）对。如第3.4.1节所述，足够大的批次大小对于在我们的设置中取得良好性能至关重要。表1列出了用于训练不同大小模型的批次大小。

items.en: We evaluate our text embedding models on a broad range of tasks: linear-probe classification, sentence similarity, and semantic search. While sentence embedding (Reimers & Gurevych, 2019; Gao et al., 2021; Giorgi et al., 2020) methods report results only on embedding benchmarks and neural information retrieval methods (Lee et al., ; Guu et al., 2020; Karpukhin et al., 2020a; Sachan et al., 2021; Izacard et al., 2021) report results only on search benchmarks, we use the same unsupervised model across all these tasks.
items.zh: 我们在广泛的任务上评估文本嵌入模型：线性探测分类、句子相似度和语义搜索。虽然句子嵌入方法（Reimers & Gurevych，2019；Gao等人，2021；Giorgi等人，2020）仅在嵌入基准上报告结果，神经信息检索方法（Lee等人；Guu等人，2020；Karpukhin等人，2020a；Sachan等人，2021；Izacard等人，2021）仅在搜索基准上报告结果，但我们在所有这些任务上使用相同的无监督模型。

items.en: The SentEval benchmark (Conneau & Kiela, 2018) is widely adopted to assess the quality of sentence embeddings, consisting of a broad collection of tasks in the categories of linear-probe classification and sentence similarity, and we use the same to evaluate ours.
items.zh: SentEval基准测试（Conneau & Kiela, 2018）被广泛用于评估句子嵌入的质量，它包含线性探针分类和句子相似度两大类任务，我们使用相同的基准来评估我们的模型。

items.en: When evaluated on linear-probe classification, the embeddings are used as features to train a linear classifier to solve a variety of downstream tasks. The results in Table 2 demonstrate a clear advantage of larger model sizes producing better features for improved classification performance. In transfer learning setup, we fine-tune unsupervised cpt-text models on SNLI (Bowman et al., 2015) and MNLI (Williams et al., 2018) datasets using entailment pairs as positive examples and contradiction pairs as negative examples. On both unsupervised learning and transfer learning settings, we achieve state-of-the-art results.
items.zh: 在线性探针分类评估中，嵌入被用作特征来训练线性分类器以解决各种下游任务。表2的结果表明，更大的模型规模能产生更好的特征，从而提升分类性能。在迁移学习设置中，我们在SNLI（Bowman等人，2015）和MNLI（Williams等人，2017）数据集上对无监督cpt-text模型进行微调，使用蕴含对作为正例，矛盾对作为负例。在无监督学习和迁移学习两种设置下，我们都取得了最先进的结果。

items.en: In this section, we discuss results using zero-shot classification and k𝑘k-nearest neighbor classification on the SST-2 binary sentiment classification task (Socher et al., 2013). We experiment with 6B (L) cpt-text model fine-tuned on NLI data for this study. In the first zero-shot experiment, each input text is assigned with one of the two labels (‘positive’, ‘negative’) based on which label has its embedding closest to the input text embedding. The performance can be further improved by prompting, where we use a simple label description, ‘this is an example of a positive/negative movie review.’, instead of a single word. This zero-shot usage of embeddings is novel compared to prior work on embeddings and it is interesting to note that our zero-shot results are better than the supervised neural network results reported along with the release of the dataset (Socher et al., 2013). In the k𝑘k-NN classification experiment, given an input text, the prediction is the majority label among 256 training examples closest to the test input in the embedding space. As shown in Table 3, the k𝑘k-NN classifier without any task-specific tuning of trainable parameters achieves results comparable to a linear classifier.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们讨论在SST-2二分类情感任务（Socher等人，2013）上使用零样本分类和k近邻分类的结果。我们使用在NLI数据上微调的6B（L）cpt-text模型进行实验。在第一个零样本实验中，每个输入文本根据其嵌入与标签嵌入的接近程度被分配为两个标签（'positive'，'negative'）之一。通过提示（prompting），我们可以进一步提高性能，使用简单的标签描述'this is an example of a positive/negative movie review.'而不是单个词。这种嵌入的零样本使用方式相对于之前的嵌入工作是新颖的，值得注意的是，我们的零样本结果优于数据集发布时报告的监督神经网络结果（Socher等人，2013）。在k近邻分类实验中，给定输入文本，预测结果是嵌入空间中距离测试输入最近的256个训练样本中的多数标签。如表3所示，无需任何任务特定的可训练参数调整，k近邻分类器就能达到与线性分类器相当的结果。

items.en: On sentence similarity tasks in SentEval, we find that our models perform worse than previous SOTA methods (Table 4). Sentence similarity is not a completely well-defined downstream task (e.g. are the sentences, ‘Jack loves Jill’ and ‘Mary loves chocolates’, similar?).111https://twitter.com/yoavgo/status/1431299645570011142222https://twitter.com/yoavgo/status/1483565266575540225?s=20 For example, Goodman (1972) argue that two objects can be infinitely similar or dissimilar (Vervaeke et al., 2012). A possible explanation for why our models perform better than prior work on search and classification but not on these tasks is that our models might not be optimized for the specific definition used by these sentence similarity benchmarks. It is important to note that previous embedding search methods do not report performance on sentence similarity tasks (Karpukhin et al., 2020a; Sachan et al., 2021; Izacard et al., 2021). More discussion on this phenomenon is presented in Section 3.4.2.
items.zh: 在SentEval的句子相似度任务上，我们发现我们的模型表现不如之前的最先进方法（表4）。句子相似度并非一个完全定义明确的下游任务（例如，句子'Jack loves Jill'和'Mary loves chocolates'是否相似？）。例如，Goodman（1972）认为两个对象可以无限相似或不相似（Vervaeke等人，2012）。我们的模型在搜索和分类任务上优于先前工作，但在这些任务上表现不佳，一个可能的解释是我们的模型可能没有针对这些句子相似度基准所使用的特定定义进行优化。值得注意的是，之前的嵌入搜索方法没有报告句子相似度任务的性能（Karpukhin等人，2020a；Sachan等人，2021；Izacard等人，2021）。关于这一现象的更多讨论见第3.4.2节。

items.en: Previous work on training embedding methods for search typically requires fine-tuning on a particular text search dataset (Karpukhin et al., 2020a; Sachan et al., 2021; Qu et al., 2021). It is also common to have a multi-step setup where fine-tuned models rely on an expensive query and document cross-attention encoder in the final step (Qu et al., 2021; Wang et al., 2020). In contrast, we push the limits of using a single embedding model for large-scale semantic search.
items.zh: 先前关于训练搜索嵌入方法的工作通常需要在特定的文本搜索数据集上进行微调（Karpukhin等人，2020a；Sachan等人，2021；Qu等人，2021）。常见的做法还包括多步骤设置，其中微调模型在最后一步依赖于昂贵的查询和文档交叉注意力编码器（Qu等人，2021；Wang等人，2020）。相比之下，我们推动了使用单一嵌入模型进行大规模语义搜索的极限。

items.en: First, we evaluate our models on several large-scale text search benchmarks. MSMARCO (Nguyen et al., 2016) requires the model to search over 4M documents while Natural Questions (NQ) (Kwiatkowski et al., 2019) and TriviaQA (Joshi et al., 2017) involve searching over 21M Wikipedia documents. We use the FAISS library (Johnson et al., 2019) to build the vector indices for approximate k𝑘k-nearest neighbor search. The same unsupervised model discussed previously achieves impressive performance on semantic search. Table 5 demonstrates that cpt-text outperforms prior unsupervised approaches by a big margin and larger model sizes consistently lead to improved performance. Surprisingly, on TriviaQA, our model is even competitive with fine-tuned models.
items.zh: 首先，我们在几个大规模文本搜索基准上评估我们的模型。MSMARCO（Nguyen等人，2016）要求模型搜索超过400万篇文档，而Natural Questions（NQ）（Kwiatkowski等人，2019）和TriviaQA（Joshi等人，2017）涉及搜索超过2100万篇维基百科文档。我们使用FAISS库（Johnson等人，2019）构建向量索引以进行近似k近邻搜索。之前讨论的相同无监督模型在语义搜索上取得了令人印象深刻的性能。表5显示，cpt-text以较大优势优于之前的无监督方法，并且更大的模型规模持续带来性能提升。令人惊讶的是，在TriviaQA上，我们的模型甚至与微调模型具有竞争力。

items.en: Next, we evaluate our models on 11 zero-shot search tasks in the BEIR evaluation suite (Thakur et al., 2021). First, we observe that our unsupervised model performs competitively even with some previous embedding methods that leverage supervised MSMARCO data (Xiong et al., 2020; Hofstätter et al., 2021). Keyword-based BM25 (Robertson, 2009) achieves the best results in the unsupervised setting while cpt-text achieves the best transfer learning results.
items.zh: 接下来，我们在BEIR评估套件（Thakur等人，2021）的11个零样本搜索任务上评估我们的模型。首先，我们观察到我们的无监督模型甚至与一些利用监督MSMARCO数据的先前嵌入方法（Xiong等人，2020；Hofstätter等人，2021）相比具有竞争力。基于关键词的BM25（Robertson，2009）在无监督设置中取得了最佳结果，而cpt-text取得了最佳的迁移学习结果。

items.en: In the transfer setting, our models achieve a 5.2% relative improvement over the previous best embedding method (Izacard et al., 2021). It also outperforms docT5query (Nogueira et al., 2019a) that relies on a fine-tuned T5 model (Raffel et al., 2019) for document expansion. cpt-text results are competitive even with methods that use substantially more compute at test time. BM25+CE (Wang et al., 2020) uses keyword search to select top 100 documents which are then re-ranked by a cross-attention neural network encoder. The ranking encoder network performs computationally expensive joint query and document attention and cannot exploit indexing and approximate nearest neighbor algorithms for fast and efficient search at query time. Several other existing work take this approach of leveraging more computation resources at query time to obtain better search performance. ColBERT v2 (Santhanam et al., 2021) is a multi-vector method that represents the query and the documents as a set of vectors, and employs a multi-step retrieval procedure to obtain relevant documents. Splade v2 (Formal et al., 2021) represents queries and documents as sparse vectors of size equivalent to the vocabulary of the BERT encoder (Devlin et al., 2019). Our cpt-text models compute only one dense embedding per document which are indexed offline and does not depend on any cross-attention re-ranker at query time.
items.zh: 在迁移设置中，我们的模型相对于之前最佳的嵌入方法（Izacard等人，2021）取得了5.2%的相对改进。它还优于依赖微调T5模型（Raffel等人，2019）进行文档扩展的docT5query（Nogueira等人，2019a）。cpt-text的结果甚至与在测试时使用更多算力的方法具有竞争力。BM25+CE（Wang等人，2020）使用关键词搜索选择前100篇文档，然后通过交叉注意力神经网络编码器重新排序。该排序编码器网络执行计算昂贵的联合查询和文档注意力，无法利用索引和近似最近邻算法在查询时进行快速高效的搜索。其他一些现有工作也采用这种方法，在查询时利用更多计算资源以获得更好的搜索性能。ColBERT v2（Santhanam等人，2021）是一种多向量方法，将查询和文档表示为一组向量，并采用多步检索过程来获取相关文档。Splade v2（Formal等人，2021）将查询和文档表示为与BERT编码器（Devlin等人，2019）词汇量大小相等的稀疏向量。我们的cpt-text模型每篇文档只计算一个稠密嵌入，这些嵌入离线索引，并且在查询时不依赖任何交叉注意力重新排序器。

items.en: We evaluate our code embedding models on the code search task using the CodeSearchNet benchmark (Husain et al., 2020). Given a natural language query, the model is expected to retrieve the relevant code block among 1K candidates. The models are evaluated on 6 programming languages and our model achieves state-of-the-art results (Table 7). Unlike with text embeddings, we do not see a performance improvement with increased model size for code embeddings.
items.zh: 我们使用CodeSearchNet基准（Husain等人，2020）在代码搜索任务上评估我们的代码嵌入模型。给定自然语言查询，模型需要在1000个候选项中检索相关的代码块。模型在6种编程语言上进行了评估，我们的模型取得了最先进的结果（表7）。与文本嵌入不同，对于代码嵌入，我们没有看到模型规模增大带来性能提升。

items.en: We also evaluate on a harder setting of finding the relevant code block among 10K candidates instead of 1K. Here, we compare the performance of cpt-text models against cpt-code models (Table 8). It is interesting to see that text embedding performs fairly well in code search especially in Python. We see a drop in performance for code embedding models with increased distractors and still don’t see bigger models giving a boost in search performance.
items.zh: 我们还在更困难的设置下进行了评估，即在10000个候选项而非1000个候选项中查找相关代码块。在这里，我们比较了cpt-text模型与cpt-code模型的性能（表8）。有趣的是，文本嵌入在代码搜索中表现相当不错，尤其是在Python中。我们看到代码嵌入模型在干扰项增加时性能下降，并且仍然没有看到更大的模型带来搜索性能的提升。

items.en: Our ablation study highlights the effect of the model’s batch size on the final performance. Table 9 compares the performance of S (300M) cpt-text model trained with different batch sizes on the NQ development set. Since we train with in-batch negatives, a larger batch increases the chances of having hard negatives in a batch, resulting in a significant performance boost.
items.zh: 我们的消融研究突出了模型批量大小对最终性能的影响。表9比较了在NQ开发集上使用不同批量大小训练的S（300M）cpt-text模型的性能。由于我们使用批次内负样本进行训练，更大的批量增加了批次中出现难负样本的机会，从而带来显著的性能提升。

items.en: We observe that as we train our models for longer, the performance on search and classification tasks increases while the performance on sentence similarity tasks decreases (Figure 4). As discussed previously, sentence similarity is not a well defined task. A hypothesis is that search tasks and sentence similarity tasks might have contradicting definitions. For example, a sentence and its negation could be considered as relevant during search, but not “similar” in sentence similarity tasks. It is also important to note that previous embedding search methods do not report performance on sentence similarity tasks (Karpukhin et al., 2020a; Sachan et al., 2021; Izacard et al., 2021) and previous sentence embedding methods do not evaluate on search tasks (Reimers & Gurevych, 2019; Giorgi et al., 2020; Gao et al., 2021). When deciding the model checkpoints to use for evaluation, we assigned higher importance to search and classification tasks as they are commonly associated with clearly defined real-world applications while sentence similarity tasks are less so.
items.zh: 我们观察到，随着训练时间的延长，搜索和分类任务的性能提高，而句子相似度任务的性能下降（图4）。如前所述，句子相似度不是一个定义明确的任务。一个假设是搜索任务和句子相似度任务可能具有矛盾的定义。例如，一个句子及其否定句在搜索中可能被认为是相关的，但在句子相似度任务中并不“相似”。同样值得注意的是，之前的嵌入搜索方法没有报告句子相似度任务的性能（Karpukhin等人，2020a；Sachan等人，2021；Izacard等人，2021），而之前的句子嵌入方法也没有在搜索任务上进行评估（Reimers & Gurevych，2019；Giorgi等人，2020；Gao等人，2021）。在决定用于评估的模型检查点时，我们更重视搜索和分类任务，因为它们通常与明确定义的实际应用相关，而句子相似度任务则不那么明确。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Performance of M (1.2B) cpt-text model on classification, search and sentence similarity tasks at different training steps. While the performance on search and classification improves with longer training, the performance on sentence similarity degrades.
items.capZh: 图4：M（1.2B）cpt-text模型在不同训练步骤下在分类、搜索和句子相似度任务上的性能。随着训练时间的延长，搜索和分类的性能提高，而句子相似度的性能下降。

items.en: The goal of representation learning (Bengio et al., 2012) is to learn an embedding space in which similar examples stay close to each other while dissimilar ones are far apart (Hadsell et al., 2006). In contrastive learning, the learning procedure is formulated as a classification problem given similar and dissimilar candidates (Chopra et al., 2005; Gutmann & Hyvärinen, 2010; Schroff et al., 2015; Sohn, 2016; van den Oord et al., 2018). Recent work relies on contrastive objective to learn representations for images (Wu et al., 2018; He et al., 2020; Chen et al., 2020; Zbontar et al., 2021), text, or both jointly (Lu et al., 2019; Sun et al., 2019; Kim et al., 2021; Radford et al., 2021; Khosla et al., 2020). In self-supervised contrastive learning, positive samples can be collected in various approaches including by creating an augmented version of the original input without modifying the semantic meaning (Gao et al., 2021), by grouping samples within the same context (Giorgi et al., 2020; Izacard et al., 2021), or by collecting data about the same object from different views (Tian et al., 2019).
items.zh: 表示学习（Bengio等人，2012）的目标是学习一个嵌入空间，其中相似的样本彼此靠近，而不相似的样本彼此远离（Hadsell等人，2006）。在对比学习中，学习过程被表述为给定相似和不相似候选者的分类问题（Chopra等人，2005；Gutmann & Hyvärinen，2010；Schroff等人，2015；Sohn，2016；van den Oord等人，2018）。最近的工作依赖对比目标来学习图像（Wu等人，2018；He等人，2020；Chen等人，2020；Zbontar等人，2021）、文本或两者联合的表示（Lu等人，2019；Sun等人，2019；Kim等人，2021；Radford等人，2021；Khosla等人，2020）。在自监督对比学习中，可以通过多种方式收集正样本，包括创建原始输入的增强版本而不修改语义含义（Gao等人，2021）、将同一上下文中的样本分组（Giorgi等人，2020；Izacard等人，2021），或从不同视角收集关于同一对象的数据（Tian等人，2019）。

items.en: Learning word embeddings is a well studied research area (Brown et al., 1992; Gutmann & Hyvärinen, 2010; Mikolov et al., 2013; Pennington et al., 2014). Learning low-dimensional representations of larger text pieces, denser than raw term-based vectors, has been studied extensively as well (Deerwester et al., 1990; Yih et al., 2011). Most of the recent models for learning sentence embeddings rely on supervised NLI datasets, using entailment pairs as positive examples and contradiction pairs as (hard) negatives. SBERT (Reimers & Gurevych, 2019) trained a siamese network to learn a representation where sentence similarity is estimated by the cosine similarity between embeddings. Li et al. (2020) improves the embedding space to be isotropic via normalizing flows. The whitening operation is another alternative operation to improve the isotropy of the embedding space (Su et al., 2021). It is typical to initialize such models with a pre-trained language model (Devlin et al., 2019) before training on NLI datasets.
items.zh: 学习词嵌入是一个研究充分的领域（Brown等人，1992；Gutmann & Hyvärinen，2010；Mikolov等人，2013；Pennington等人，2014）。学习更大文本片段的低维表示（比原始基于词的向量更稠密）也得到了广泛研究（Deerwester等人，1990；Yih等人，2011）。最近大多数学习句子嵌入的模型依赖于监督NLI数据集，使用蕴含对作为正例，矛盾对作为（难）负例。SBERT（Reimers & Gurevych，2019）训练了一个孪生网络来学习表示，其中句子相似度通过嵌入之间的余弦相似度来估计。Li等人（2020）通过归一化流改进了嵌入空间，使其各向同性。白化操作是另一种改善嵌入空间各向同性的替代操作（Su等人，2021）。通常，这些模型在NLI数据集上训练之前，会使用预训练语言模型（Devlin等人，2019）进行初始化。

items.en: Several methods have been studied for unsupervised or self-supervised sentence embedding learning (Logeswaran & Lee, 2018; Zhang et al., 2020; Gao et al., 2021). Common approaches consider sentences within the same context as semantically similar samples (Kiros et al., 2015; Logeswaran & Lee, 2018). To create positive training pairs with augmented samples, a diverse set of text augmentation operations have been explored, including lexicon-based distortion (Wei & Zou, 2019), synonym replacement (Kobayashi, 2018), back-translation (Fang & Xie, 2020), cut-off (Shen et al., 2020) and dropout (Gao et al., 2021). However, unsupervised sentence embedding models still perform notably worse than supervised sentence encoders.
items.zh: 已经研究了几种无监督或自监督句子嵌入学习的方法（Logeswaran & Lee，2018；Zhang等人，2020；Gao等人，2021）。常见的方法将同一上下文中的句子视为语义相似的样本（Kiros等人，2015；Logeswaran & Lee，2018）。为了创建带有增强样本的正训练对，已经探索了多种文本增强操作，包括基于词典的扭曲（Wei & Zou，2019）、同义词替换（Kobayashi，2018）、回译（Fang & Xie，2020）、截断（Shen等人，2020）和丢弃（Gao等人，2021）。然而，无监督句子嵌入模型的性能仍然明显差于监督句子编码器。

items.en: Large-scale text search based on dense embeddings and neural information retrieval (neural IR) have the potential to generalize better than keyword matching in classic IR systems. Neural IR systems encode documents at the indexing stage and then perform nearest neighbor search (Johnson et al., 2019) at query time (Lin et al., 2021). Neural IR models are usually learned by fine-tuning a pre-trained language model on supervised search corpus (Lee et al., ; Guu et al., 2020; Karpukhin et al., 2020b; Lewis et al., 2020). Many SOTA search models combine classical IR with neural IR in a staged setup, where the candidates are first narrowed down by BM25 keyword search (Robertson, 2009) and then re-ranked by joint query and document neural encoders (Nogueira et al., 2019b; Qu et al., 2021). Xiong et al. (2020) proposed ANCE, a contrastive learning framework for learning text representations for dense retrieval using mined hard negatives. Other unsupervised retriever methods use the Inverse Cloze Task or masked salient spans to achieve significant improvement on ODQA tasks (Sachan et al., 2021). In comparison to most prior work, we find that with a large enough batch size, it is possible to achieve good search performance without using supervised data. Finally, the recently published Contriever (Izacard et al., 2021) is most similar to our work on learning text embeddings for text search using contrastive learning on unlabeled data.
items.zh: 基于稠密嵌入和神经信息检索的大规模文本搜索有可能比经典信息检索系统中的关键词匹配具有更好的泛化能力。神经信息检索系统在索引阶段编码文档，然后在查询时执行最近邻搜索（Johnson等人，2019）（Lin等人，2021）。神经信息检索模型通常通过在监督搜索语料库上微调预训练语言模型来学习（Lee等人；Guu等人，2020；Karpukhin等人，2020b；Lewis等人，2020）。许多最先进的搜索模型将经典信息检索与神经信息检索结合在分阶段设置中，首先通过BM25关键词搜索（Robertson，2009）缩小候选范围，然后通过联合查询和文档神经编码器重新排序（Nogueira等人，2019b；Qu等人，2021）。Xiong等人（2020）提出了ANCE，一种用于学习稠密检索文本表示的对比学习框架，使用挖掘的难负样本。其他无监督检索器方法使用逆完形任务或掩码显著跨度，在开放域问答任务上取得了显著改进（Sachan等人，2021）。与大多数先前工作相比，我们发现，在足够大的批量大小下，无需使用监督数据即可实现良好的搜索性能。最后，最近发布的Contriever（Izacard等人，2021）与我们的工作最为相似，它使用无标签数据上的对比学习来学习用于文本搜索的文本嵌入。

items.en: Semantic code search refers to the task of retrieving code relevant to a query in natural language. The CodeSearchNet challenge (Husain et al., 2020) presents a set of benchmark code search tasks in different programming languages, as well as a simple baseline model to predict embeddings of query and code via contrastive learning on a dataset of (text, code) pairs. ContraCode (Jain et al., 2021) uses a contrastive learning task of identifying functionally similar programs, where the functionally similar samples are generated via source-to-source compiler transformations. CodeBERT (Feng et al., 2020) learns to predict semantic similarity with a pre-trained language model and GraphCodeBERT (Guo et al., 2021) further improves the performance on the CodeSearchNet benchmark by adding pre-training tasks on code structure.
items.zh: 语义代码搜索是指检索与自然语言查询相关的代码的任务。CodeSearchNet挑战（Husain等人，2020）提供了一组不同编程语言的基准代码搜索任务，以及一个简单的基线模型，该模型通过对比学习在（文本，代码）对数据集上预测查询和代码的嵌入。ContraCode（Jain等人，2021）使用对比学习任务来识别功能相似的程序，其中功能相似的样本通过源到源编译器转换生成。CodeBERT（Feng等人，2020）通过预训练语言模型学习预测语义相似度，GraphCodeBERT（Guo等人，2021）通过添加代码结构上的预训练任务进一步提高了CodeSearchNet基准的性能。

items.en: Prior research has shown that text representation models encode the biases present in their training data, including those which are discriminatory towards protected groups such as Black people or women (Bolukbasi et al., 2016; Caliskan et al., 2017; May et al., 2019; Zhao et al., 2018; Rudinger et al., 2018). Biases encoded in embedding models may cause representational harms333 Representational harms occur when systems reinforce the subordination of some groups along the lines of identity, e.g. stereotyping or denigration (Crawford, 2017). by reinforcing existent societal biases in the text corpus, and further propagating them in downstream tasks of embedding models.
items.zh: 先前的研究表明，文本表示模型编码了其训练数据中存在的偏见，包括那些对受保护群体（如黑人或女性）具有歧视性的偏见（Bolukbasi等人，2016；Caliskan等人，2017；May等人，2019；Zhao等人，2018；Rudinger等人，2018）。嵌入模型中编码的偏见可能会通过强化文本语料库中现有的社会偏见，并进一步在嵌入模型的下游任务中传播，从而造成代表性伤害。

items.en: Therefore, we encourage further research on two research agendas: (a) developing robust evaluation methodologies for multiple classes of bias in training data and pre-trained models, and (b) developing and improving methods for mitigating encoded bias, including fine-tuning to reduce bias in pre-trained models (Caliskan et al., 2017; May et al., 2019; Bolukbasi et al., 2016; Liang et al., 2020; Park et al., 2018; Solaiman & Dennison, 2021). Until we have robust evaluation methodology, it is important to restrict and monitor the use of the model in downstream applications. Particularly for those where risk of representational harm is great and those where biased representations may influence the allocation of resources and opportunities to people.
items.zh: 因此，我们鼓励在以下两个研究议程上开展进一步研究：（a）开发针对训练数据和预训练模型中多类偏见的稳健评估方法；（b）开发并改进减轻编码偏见的方法，包括通过微调减少预训练模型中的偏见（Caliskan等人，2017；May等人，2019；Bolukbasi等人，2016；Liang等人，2020；Park等人，2018；Solaiman & Dennison，2021）。在拥有稳健的评估方法之前，限制和监控模型在下游应用中的使用非常重要，特别是对于那些代表性伤害风险较大以及有偏见的表示可能影响资源和机会分配的应用。

items.en: Our embedding models are trained with large batch sizes and require substantial computation resources. While this training regime is environmentally and computationally costly, there are promising paths forward to amortize and offset these costs while allowing users to benefits from the capabilities of these models. For example, safe public access to large pre-trained language models, and efficient training pipelines that leverage improved model architectures and training schemes. We encourage further research and implementation efforts in these areas.
items.zh: 我们的嵌入模型使用大批量进行训练，需要大量的计算资源。虽然这种训练方式在环境和计算上成本高昂，但存在有前景的路径来分摊和抵消这些成本，同时让用户能够受益于这些模型的能力。例如，安全地公开访问大型预训练语言模型，以及利用改进的模型架构和训练方案的高效训练流程。我们鼓励在这些领域进行进一步的研究和实施工作。

items.en: We showed that contrastive pre-training on unsupervised data with a sufficiently large batch size can lead to high quality vector representations of text and code. Our models achieved new state-of-the-art results in linear-probe classification, text search and code search. We find that our models underperformed on sentence similarity tasks and observed unexpected training behavior with respect to these tasks. Finally, we discussed the broader impact of our work on society.
items.zh: 我们展示了在无监督数据上进行对比预训练，并使用足够大的批量，可以产生高质量的文本和代码向量表示。我们的模型在线性探测分类、文本搜索和代码搜索方面取得了新的最先进结果。我们发现模型在句子相似性任务上表现不佳，并观察到与这些任务相关的意外训练行为。最后，我们讨论了工作对社会的更广泛影响。
